commit.message:
Fix PWA mobile header overlapping iOS status bar

MobileHeader component was positioned at top:0 without accounting for
safe-area-inset-top, causing it to render underneath the iOS status bar
(time, battery, signal) in PWA standalone mode.

Added paddingTop: var(--pwa-safe-top) to respect safe area insets.

This fixes the garbled/overlapping header text issue in PWA.

vercel.json routes bypass Next.js middleware. Switch to client-side
useAuth() + RedirectToSignIn which works independently of middleware.

commit.message:
Fix CLI init crash when selecting github auth mode (#57)

The init command only prompted for basic auth credentials (username/password)
and did nothing for github mode, causing a ZodError from the config schema
validation. Add prompts for clientId, clientSecret, and callbackUrl when
github auth is selected, along with corresponding CLI flags for
non-interactive use.

commit.message:
Fix track/art/now-playing sync by aligning queue order with mpv playlist

Store self._queue in the same rotated order as mpv's playlist so that
mpv playlist-pos N always maps directly to self._queue[N]. Previously
the queue was unrotated while mpv's playlist started at start_index,
causing track info, album art, and now-playing to drift out of sync
after the first track change.

commit.message:
Handle window index reuse when re-checking terminated sessions

When a terminated session's tmux window index is reused by a new agent,
detect_status reads the wrong pane and falsely revives the old session.

Both daemon and TUI now build a set of active window indices and skip
detect_status for terminated sessions whose window is owned by another
active session.

commit.message:
Support multiple PCM formats in VU meter (float32/64, int16/32)

Previously only float32 was supported, silently disabling the VU meter
on devices that deliver integer PCM. Now detects the format from the
AudioStreamBasicDescription and handles the common sample types.

commit.message:
fix: eliminar doble conteo de vacancia en flujo de caja

Antes el mes 1 tenía ingreso=0 por vacancia Y además se prorrateaba
la vacancia como costo mensual, contando dos veces. Ahora todos los
meses usan prorrateo uniforme via calcFlujoDesglose: ingreso completo
con vacancia, GGCC, corretaje y recambio prorrateados como costos.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Split lamppost into iron + globe meshes so globe emits light correctly

material_override on MultiMeshInstance3D was replacing the globe's frosted glass
material with opaque cast iron, hiding the emissive sphere inside. Fix: Blender
script now exports two objects (CP_Lamppost iron, CP_Lamppost_Globe glass) in
one GLB. furniture_builder spawns them as separate MultiMesh groups — iron gets
cast iron shader, globe gets emissive material. Eliminates the invisible emissive
sphere hack entirely.

commit.message:
feat: sovereign autonomy layer — wallet, social, proactive engine

Three new modules for Jarvis autonomous agency:

- wallet.js: EOA generation, AES-256-GCM encrypted keys, spending
  limits ($50/day, $20/tx), whitelist-only destinations, multi-chain
  (Base, ETH, Arbitrum, OP), full transaction ledger

- social.js: Outbound presence on X/Twitter (OAuth 1.0a), Discord
  (webhooks), GitHub (PAT). Rate-limited, content-queued, never spammy.
  Credentials from env vars, never persisted to disk.

- proactive.js: Autonomous scheduled actions — market pulse (6h),
  build updates (24h), thought leadership (12h), mention monitoring
  (4h), GitHub digests (weekly). Master switch, per-action control.

All three wired into claude.js (LLM tools), index.js (init/flush/stop),
and Telegram commands (/wallet, /social, /proactive — owner-only).

commit.message:
Fix screenshot uploads in bug reporter (#2516)

* Upload screenshots to GitHub before creating issues

- Add PRManager.upload_screenshot() — uploads local PNG to GitHub via
  gist and returns a permanent URL for embedding in issue markdown
- Update report_issue_loop to upload screenshots before invoking the
  agent, passing the URL (for issue body) and local path (for Claude
  to read and understand the bug)
- Add post-creation verification: check that the hydraflow-ready label
  was applied and the screenshot URL is in the issue body, fix if not
- Update hf.issue skill to use uploaded URLs instead of local paths
- Never embed local filesystem paths in GitHub issue markdown

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Use GitHub release assets for screenshot uploads (gists reject binary)

GitHub gists reject binary files, so the previous upload_screenshot
used gist create which would fail for actual PNGs. Switch to uploading
screenshots as release assets on a dedicated "screenshots" release tag.

Verified end-to-end: upload returns a working URL that renders in
GitHub issue markdown.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix ruff formatting for CI compliance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: handle Dify workflow events (workflow_finished instead of message_end)

The Dify app uses Workflow mode which sends workflow_started,
node_started/finished, message, and workflow_finished events.
Our code only handled message_end which never fires in workflow mode,
so dify_conversation_id was never saved and every message started
a new conversation. Now handles both message_end and workflow_finished,
and captures conversation_id from any event that includes it.

commit.message:
REFERENCES.md: 125 citations — 7 new sections grounding CK in published science

New sections added:
- S10: Cardio-Respiratory-Neural Coupling (12 papers)
  Buzsaki, Fries, Steriade, Porges, Thayer, Zelano, Pikovsky,
  Flash & Hogan, Haggard — grounds 5D = 3 brain + 1 heart + 1 breath
- S11: Consciousness Architectures (8 papers)
  Tononi IIT, Baars GWT, Freeman chaos, Friston FEP, Kuramoto, Blum CTM
- S12: Embodied Linguistics & Sound Symbolism (8 papers)
  Lakoff, Barsalou, Sapir, Ramachandran bouba/kiki, Goldberg CxG, Maeda
- S13: Discrete Differential Geometry (2 papers)
  Crane DDG, Sullivan curvature vs second derivative distinction
- S14: Olfactory/Gustatory Computational Models (4 papers)
  Freeman K-sets, Shepherd convergence, Bhatt temporal coding
- S15: Category Theory & Algebraic Consciousness (3 papers)
  Northoff-Tsuchiya, Blum-Blum CTM, Clifford-Preston
- S16: Novel Claims — Flagged as Original (5 claims)
  T*=5/7, Hebrew mapping, tense-from-olfactory, taste/smell duality,
  5D=3brain+1heart+1breath. Each with testable predictions.

Total: 83 -> 125 peer-reviewed citations. Every claim traced to
published science or honestly flagged as original contribution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix native TTS not playing audio on individual playback (#99) (#101)

Root cause: AVSpeechSynthesizer.speak() fails silently when called
immediately after audio session activation. The session needs a brief
moment to fully initialize.

Changes:
- Add 50ms delay before speak() for individual (non-continuous) playback
- Skip stopSpeaking() when synthesizer is not speaking to avoid
  putting it in an unstable state

The AVAudioBuffer warnings in console are a known iOS 17+ framework
bug and do not affect functionality.

Closes #99

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use Next.js after() for reliable Slack background processing

Root cause: /abra responded with "thinking" but never posted the actual
answer. Two issues:
1. Supabase env vars (NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY)
   were missing from Vercel production — callAbraChat() returned early
2. void backgroundPromise pattern was unreliable on Vercel serverless —
   function could terminate after sending the response

Fix: Added Supabase env vars to Vercel production. Replaced void promise
with Next.js 15 after() API which guarantees background work completes.
